title: RBSE 12th Supplementary Exam Date Sheet 2026 OUT

detail.title: RBSE 12th Supplementary Exam Date Sheet 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: RBSE 12th Supplementary Exam Date Sheet 2026 is out for Class 12 compartment exams. Rajasthan Board has scheduled the supplementary exams from 14 May to 16 May 2026 in the morning shift. Check subject-wise exam dates, timings, and download the official PDF here.

sections.heading: RBSE 12th Supplementary Exam Date Sheet 2026 OUT

content.text: The Board of Secondary Education, Rajasthan (RBSE) has officially released the RBSE 12th Supplementary Exam Date Sheet 2026 for Class 12 compartment examinations. The supplementary exams are scheduled from May 14 to May 16, 2026, in a single morning shift from 8:30 AM to 11:45 AM. Students who could not clear one or more subjects in the main exams can now check the complete schedule on the official website rajeduboard.rajasthan.gov.in.

Students can download the official RBSE 12th Supplementary Time Table 2026 PDF using the direct link provided below. The date sheet includes subject codes, exam dates, and important instructions for regular and CwSN candidates.
Download RBSE 12th Supplementary Exam Date Sheet 2026 PDF Here

links.text: Download RBSE 12th Supplementary Exam Date Sheet 2026 PDF Here

sections.heading: RBSE 12th Supplementary Exam Date Sheet 2026 Overview

content.text: The RBSE 12th Supplementary Exam Date Sheet 2026 provides a clear schedule for compartment exams of Class 12. Conducted by the Rajasthan Board of Secondary Education, these exams offer a second chance to students to improve their results and qualify for higher studies.

sections.heading: RBSE 12th Supplementary Exam Date Sheet 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: The RBSE 12th Supplementary Exam Date Sheet 2026 includes subject-wise dates for theory papers. Students are advised to prepare according to the given schedule. The exams will be held in one session daily from 8:30 AM to 11:45 AM.

rows: Hindi Anivarya (01/121), Angreji Anivarya (02/122), Sanskrit (various), Urdu, Punjabi, Sindhi, Gujarati, and core subjects including Hindi, English, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, General Science, Agriculture Science etc.

Computer Science, Informatics Practices, Home Science, Economics, Political Science, Sociology, History, Business Studies, Accountancy, Mathematics, Drawing, Music, various languages and vocational subjects
Vocational Subjects - Automotive, Beauty & Wellness, Health Care, IT & ITES, Retail, Security, Agriculture, Electronics & Hardware and other vocational streams

sections.heading: How to Download RBSE 12th Supplementary Exam Date Sheet 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the RBSE 12th Supplementary Exam Date Sheet 2026 from the official RBSE website. Follow the simple steps given below to access the timetable quickly.

items: Visit the official website of Rajasthan Board at rajeduboard.rajasthan.gov.in.
On the homepage, look for the "News Updates" or "Important Announcements" section.
Click on the link that reads "Supplementary Time Table 2026" or "12th Supplementary Exam Date Sheet 2026".
The PDF file will open on your screen.
Click on the download icon or use Ctrl + S to save the PDF on your device.
Print a copy of the date sheet for future reference and exam preparation.

content.text: Note: Always check the official timetable carefully and keep a printed copy handy for your exam preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in RBSE 12th Supplementary Exam Date Sheet 2026

content.text: The official RBSE 12th Supplementary Exam Date Sheet 2026 contains all essential information required by students appearing for compartment exams. It helps candidates plan their preparation effectively.

items: Exam dates and corresponding days (May 14 to 16, 2026)
Subject names along with their codes
Exam timings - 8:30 AM to 11:45 AM
Instructions for students regarding exam day rules
Guidelines for Children with Special Needs (CwSN)
Prohibitions on use of unfair means and electronic devices
Important notes on admit cards and moderation of cases
Contact details and official announcements section
